subtitle: Fullstack Developer
about_text: I create modern web applications from scratch. I work with both frontend (React, Vue) and backend (Node.js, Python, databases). I love clean code and solving complex problems.
db_note: * Deep experience with databases: design, query optimization, big data processing.
open_text: ⚡️ Open to job offers and interesting projects. Write to Telegram — I reply fast!
